Aruba.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Dutch Caribbean, Netherlands COL as reference

Barbade.budget_override_reason: Premium Caribbean island; no Numbeo direct data; tourist market comparable to Bahamas/Cayman Islands

Gabon.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Central Africa, oil economy

Japon.budget_override_reason: Tourist prices significantly above local COL (Numbeo Tokyo city=73)

Laos.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Southeast Asia low-income (Cambodia 34, Vietnam 26)
Laos.budget_proxy_reason: Vietnam Numbeo proxy (similar SE Asia economy)

Maldives.budget_override_reason: Resort-only destination, no local economy pricing for tourists

Monaco.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: France COL × 1.4 — ultra-premium enclave

Nouvelle-Calédonie.budget_override_reason: Remote island destination, logistics costs inflate all prices

Palaos.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Pacific island, no Numbeo data

Polynésie française.budget_override_reason: Remote island destination, logistics costs inflate all prices

Portugal.budget_override_reason: Tourist prices in line with southern Europe neighbors (Spain=51)

Qatar.budget_override_reason: Hotel/tourism prices well above local COL (expat-skewed index)

Seychelles.budget_override_reason: Premium resort destination, tourist prices far above local COL

Émirats Arabes Unis.budget_override_reason: Hotel/tourism prices well above local COL (expat-skewed index)
